briefs.subject: forest mountains
briefs.prompt: Create a transparent, seam-safe three-ridge pixel-art mountain plane that fills the lower field without a rectangular sky.
requirements: Binary alpha only.
Horizontal composition must tolerate deterministic phase and horizontal flip.
Use the biome palette and remain readable behind gameplay.

briefs.subject: forest floating islands
briefs.prompt: Create a transparent sparse pixel-art floating-island plane with rock shelves, roots, vegetation and occasional waterfalls.
requirements: Binary alpha only.
Horizontal composition must tolerate deterministic phase and horizontal flip.
Use the biome palette and remain readable behind gameplay.
